name: io.github.itsalissonsilva/cipher-mcp
description:
Classical cipher tools for AI agents.
Encrypt, decrypt, normalize, validate, and explore ciphers through one MCP server.

tools.name: encrypt_text
tools.description: Encrypt plaintext with a selected cipher and key via cipher.tools.

tools.name: decrypt_text
tools.description: Decrypt ciphertext with a selected cipher and key via cipher.tools.

tools.name: list_ciphers
tools.description: Fetch the current upstream cipher list.

tools.name: normalize_text
tools.description: Uppercase text, strip punctuation, and optionally preserve spaces.

tools.name: validate_cipher_input
tools.description: Catch bad key shapes and text compatibility issues before API calls.

tools.name: random_key
tools.description: Generate a plausible key for supported cipher families.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Verify upstream reachability and report latency.

tools.name: examples_for_cipher
tools.description: Return ready-to-run sample inputs for common ciphers.

tools.name: detect_possible_ciphers
tools.description: Heuristically guess likely cipher families from text shape.
